calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-14-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-14-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098.

Tito Torres, Esq. appeared for plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority.
Twima Earley, property manager for plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendants Willie Martin or Terri Priestly.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial filed March 26, 2008.

Plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1---San Francisco Housing Authority
Dwelling Lease dated 02/01/98-------------------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---Notice of Termination of Tenancy dated 11/20/07-------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 3---SFPD Incident Report dated 08/22/07-------------------------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority, and against defendants WILLIE MARTIN and TERRI PRIESTLY as follows:

Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority shall recover from defendants WILLIE MARTIN and TERRI PRIESTLY Rent and Per Diem damages in the sum of $263.90, and Costs in the amount of $70.00, for a Total Judgment for plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority in the amount of $333.90.
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 21 Double Rock Street, San Francisco, CA 94124. The lease is forfeited.

Counsel stipulates to the return of the Exhibit.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-10-2008 Off Calendar
